dashboard.label: Upload History
dashboard.description: Historical record of all CIS-CAT scan uploads — track compliance score progress over time

panel.title: Compliance Score Trend by Assessment Date

search.query: | dedup upload_batch_id, asset_hostname, benchmark_title, profile | eval assessment_date=strftime(strptime(assessment_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d") | stats avg(compliance_score) AS "Avg Score %", min(compliance_score) AS "Min Score %", max(compliance_score) AS "Max Score %" by assessment_date | eval "Avg Score %"=round('Avg Score %', 1) | eval "Min Score %"=round('Min Score %', 1) | eval "Max Score %"=round('Max Score %', 1) | sort assessment_date

| dedup upload_batch_id, asset_hostname, benchmark_title, profile | eval assessment_date=strftime(strptime(assessment_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d") | stats mean(compliance_score) AS score by assessment_date, asset_hostname | eval score=round(score, 1) | chart values(score) over assessment_date by asset_hostname

| dedup upload_batch_id | eval upload_date=strftime(strptime(upload_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table upload_date, asset_hostname, benchmark_title, profile, upload_batch_id | rename upload_date AS "Upload Date", asset_hostname AS Host, benchmark_title AS Benchmark, profile AS Profile, upload_batch_id AS "Batch ID" | sort - "Upload Date"

| dedup upload_batch_id, asset_hostname, benchmark_title, profile, rule_id | eval upload_date=strftime(strptime(upload_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | stats max(compliance_score) AS "Compliance Score %", count(eval(result="pass")) AS Pass, count(eval(result="fail")) AS Fail, count(eval(result="error")) AS Error, count(eval(result="notapplicable" OR result="informational")) AS Excluded, count AS Total by upload_date, asset_hostname, benchmark_title, profile | eval "Compliance Score %"=round('Compliance Score %', 1) | rename upload_date AS "Upload Date", asset_hostname AS Host, benchmark_title AS Benchmark, profile AS Profile | sort - "Upload Date"
